[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000000101 2
1 000001000 1
2 011001010 4
3 110001000 3
4 000000101 2
5 000001000 1
6 011001010 4
7 000000000 a

01 10 000000101 2 match 0 4
12 21 000000001 1
23 32 001001001 3
34 43 010011000 3
45 54 000010000 1
56 65 000000100 1
67 76 010001000 2
70 07 010001000 2

02 20 000101001 3
13 31 000000011 2
24 42 000001000 1 match 1 5
35 53 001010001 3
46 64 010001000 2
57 75 001000000 1
60 06 010001100 3
71 17 000000010 1

03 30 010001001 3
14 41 000000000 a match 7
25 52 001000001 2
36 63 010001000 2
47 74 010001000 2
50 05 000000101 2 match 0 4
61 16 000000100 1
72 27 001001000 2

04 40 110001000 3 match 3
15 51 000000101 2 match 0 4
26 62 000001000 1 match 1 5
37 73 011001010 4 match 2 6
[completion]
